Page One Copy

Your website copy, strategically generated — page by page, section by section, built around your brand's actual point of view.

By entering your email you agree to receive occasional emails from Gumptious Design Shop. No spam, ever. Unsubscribe anytime.

Your data goes nowhere. This tool runs in real-time. Nothing is saved, nothing is stored. Close the tab and it is gone.

The copy it generates is a strategic starting point, not a finished product. It is built on a proven content framework, shaped by your answers, and designed to sound like your brand. Like any AI output, it still needs your eyes, your judgment, and your voice before it is ready to publish.

Think of it as the blank page, solved. What you do with it from here is yours.

Page One Copy by Gumptious

Before we write anything

We orient the brand first.

This isn't a typical copy form. We're not looking for taglines or polished answers. We're clarifying what your brand stands for — its posture, its position, its point of view — so the copy that follows feels inevitable, not generic.

Direct, imperfect answers are more useful than refined ones.

01

This determines which pages your site actually needs — not every business needs the same ones.

Therapist / Counsellor
Psychologist, psychotherapist, social worker
Health & Wellness Coach
Life coach, nutritionist, somatic practitioner, yoga teacher
Business / Executive Coach
Entrepreneur coach, career coach, leadership coach
Creative Services
Designer, photographer, copywriter, stylist, interior designer
Finance & Legal
Financial advisor, accountant, lawyer, mortgage broker
Beauty & Aesthetics
Esthetician, makeup artist, hair stylist, med spa
Education & Thought Leadership
Course creator, speaker, author, researcher
Events & Hospitality
Event planner, caterer, florist, private chef

Pages we'll write for you

02

No jargon. As if explaining to a smart friend who has never heard of you.

03

Strong brands are defined as much by what they refuse as by what they offer.

04

This is where your real positioning lives. Don't be polite here.

05

Not think — feel. The emotional register before a single word is read.

06

Your voice stays consistent across every page. Everything is written through this lens.

07

Specific situations and feelings — not vague outcomes. When a visitor thinks "that's exactly where I am right now" — you've earned the scroll.

08

This tells us where they're coming from and why the usual solutions fell short.

09

Name your main offer(s) and the philosophy or method behind them that no one else has.

That's everything. What comes next is copy structured around your actual point of view — not a template wearing your name.

Orienting your brand.

Reading your answers carefully and building a positioning statement before writing a single word of copy.
